svg.text: A refined production-ready evolution of the current screen.
Album selected. Filter off. Photos order.
Run summary remains pinned while warnings stay readable.
Progress, recent errors, and preview remain on one screen.
Better hierarchy without changing the workflow.
Confirmation required before broader overwrite behavior.
Two children leaning toward a white-blossoming tree on a bright April afternoon.
Confirmation needed before broader metadata overwrite.
